mapper.sql: select s.sku_id, s.product_id, p.product_name, s.sku_code, s.sku_name, s.cost_price, s.sale_price, s.stock_qty, s.status, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from erp_product_sku s left join erp_product p on p.product_id = s.product_id
mapper.insert: insert into erp_product_sku(product_id, sku_code, sku_name, cost_price, sale_price, stock_qty, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{productId}, #{skuCode}, #{skuName}, #{costPrice}, #{salePrice}, #{stockQty}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from erp_product_sku where sku_id in
#{skuId}
